sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87415" key="proe/rpw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προέρπω</orth>, <sense id="n87415.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">issue forth,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὡς θηρίον ἐκ φωλεῶν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.29</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
